string.name: defect_report
string.value: ={{ (() => { const out = JSON.parse($node['Patch + Rerun Failed Stage'].json.stdout); const latest = out.defect_reports?.[out.defect_reports.length - 1] || null; return latest ? JSON.stringify(latest) : ($node['Normalize Repair Input'].json.defect_report || ''); })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, job_id: $json.job_id, job_runtime_path: $json.job_runtime_path, failed_stage: $json.failed_stage, defect_report: $json.defect_report, attempt: $json.attempt, request: JSON.parse($json.request_json || '{}') } }}
